rules.description: PVC requests using fast-ssd cannot exceed 5,000 IOPS.
rules.remediation: Request at most 5000 IOPS or open a platform capacity request.

rules.description: Applications must not hardcode private service IPs.
rules.remediation: Use a Kubernetes service DNS name.

rules.description: Public ingress must use TLS and public-nginx.
rules.remediation: Use ingressClassName public-nginx and configure TLS.

rules.description: A container may request no more than 4 CPU.
rules.remediation: Reduce the CPU request to 4 or less.
